prompt:
Kitchen counter scene — hyper-realistic 1:1 lifestyle product-in-scene photograph, 4K. NO PEOPLE, NO hands. Just the product in a natural environment.

ANGLE: a DRAMATIC LOW-ANGLE perspective from just below the counter surface looking UP and slightly across at the jar (the camera sits at the marble counter's edge looking inward). The jar appears slightly taller / monumental from this angle. NOT head-on, NOT top-down — low-angle 3/4 perspective.

SCENE: a sunlit modern kitchen counter mid-morning, white marble surface. The Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar (matching the provided reference — black plastic, teal/cyan + gold/yellow accents, GOLD LID on top, jar CLOSED, front label fully legible 'DIALED SEA MOSS Gummies, 60 GUMMIES, DIETARY SUPPLEMENT', side panel 'MsB° Mineral Support Blend') sits centered in the frame on the marble counter. Naturally staged props around the jar (some out-of-focus): a small ceramic dish holding 4-5 dark sugar-dusted gummy CUBES, a fresh lemon slice on a wood cutting board to the side, a soft-focus stainless-steel water bottle and small white ceramic coffee cup with steam in the background, a folded linen napkin under the dish.

LIGHTING: bright clean direct natural daylight pouring from a tall window on the right, wrapping the jar uniformly. Clean soft specular highlight on the jar's curved glossy black plastic. Label catches the light crisply. Natural neutral drop-shadow behind the jar on the marble.

BACKGROUND: minimalist scandi-modern kitchen — out-of-focus white oak open shelving with linen-stoneware mugs and a small potted herb, soft white walls. Shallow depth-of-field.

STYLE: hyper-realistic product-environment photography, 35mm low-angle look, f/2.8 shallow depth, bright airy real-photograph feel. NO AI artifacts, NO text overlays, NO graphic elements, NO callouts.
